members.name: _GetBarBeats
members.summary: Override this method to return the bar beats of this stream.

members.name: _GetBeatCount
members.summary: Overridable method. Should return the total number of beats of this audio stream. Used by the engine to determine the position of every beat. Ideally, the returned value should be based off the stream's sample rate ([member AudioStreamWAV.mix_rate], for example).

members.name: _GetBpm
members.summary: Overridable method. Should return the tempo of this audio stream, in beats per minute (BPM). Used by the engine to determine the position of every beat. Ideally, the returned value should be based off the stream's sample rate ([member AudioStreamWAV.mix_rate], for example).

members.name: _GetLength
members.summary: Override this method to customize the returned value of [method get_length]. Should return the length of this audio stream, in seconds.

members.name: _GetParameterList
members.summary: Return the controllable parameters of this stream. This array contains dictionaries with a property info description format (see [method Object.get_property_list]). Additionally, the default value for this parameter must be added tho each dictionary in "default_value" field.

members.name: _GetStreamName
members.summary: Override this method to customize the name assigned to this audio stream. Unused by the engine.

members.name: _GetTags
members.summary: Override this method to customize the tags for this audio stream. Should return a [Dictionary] of strings with the tag as the key and its content as the value. Commonly used tags include [code]title[/code], [code]artist[/code], [code]album[/code], [code]tracknumber[/code], and [code]date[/code].

members.name: _HasLoop
members.summary: Override this method to return [code]true[/code] if this stream has a loop.

members.name: _InstantiatePlayback
members.summary: Override this method to customize the returned value of [method instantiate_playback]. Should return a new [AudioStreamPlayback] created when the stream is played (such as by an [AudioStreamPlayer]).

members.name: _IsMonophonic
members.summary: Override this method to customize the returned value of [method is_monophonic]. Should return [code]true[/code] if this audio stream only supports one channel.

members.name: CanBeSampled
members.summary: Returns if the current [AudioStream] can be used as a sample. Only static streams can be sampled.

members.name: GenerateSample
members.summary: Generates an [AudioSample] based on the current stream.

members.name: GetLength
members.summary: Returns the length of the audio stream in seconds. If this stream is an [AudioStreamRandomizer], returns the length of the last played stream. If this stream has an indefinite length (such as for [AudioStreamGenerator] and [AudioStreamMicrophone]), returns [code]0.0[/code].

members.name: InstantiatePlayback
members.summary: Returns a newly created [AudioStreamPlayback] intended to play this audio stream. Useful for when you want to extend [method _instantiate_playback] but call [method instantiate_playback] from an internally held AudioStream subresource. An example of this can be found in the source code for [code]AudioStreamRandomPitch::instantiate_playback[/code].

members.name: IsMetaStream
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the stream is a collection of other streams, [code]false[/code] otherwise.

members.name: IsMonophonic
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if this audio stream only supports one channel ([i]monophony[/i]), or [code]false[/code] if the audio stream supports two or more channels ([i]polyphony[/i]).

signals.name: ParameterListChanged
signals.summary: Signal to be emitted to notify when the parameter list changed.
